plans.name: $5/week starter plan
plans.tone: Start tiny, prove the habit, and let consistency do the first job.

plans.name: $10/week starter plan
plans.tone: A gentle automatic amount once bills and emergency cash are covered.

plans.name: $25/week momentum plan
plans.tone: A steady step when your cushion is growing and debt is not crowding you.

plans.name: $50/week wealth builder plan
plans.tone: A stronger habit for weeks when your cash buffer has real breathing room.

stockIdeas.name: Vanguard S&P 500 ETF
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Broad market ETF; no single-company press catalyst.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Low single-policy exposure because it tracks a broad index.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Broad U.S. market exposure can fit a beginner habit when cash is protected and the holding period is long.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Market-wide drawdowns can still happen, so this is not for emergency money.

stockIdeas.name: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Dividend and quality factor exposure; catalyst is slower income consistency.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Low single-company committee exposure because it is diversified.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Dividend-focused exposure may appeal to beginners who want slower, steadier market participation.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Dividend funds can lag fast-growth markets and dividends are never guaranteed.

stockIdeas.name: Microsoft
stockIdeas.pressNotes: AI, cloud, and enterprise software remain recurring public-market catalysts.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Technology, AI, cybersecurity, and federal cloud discussions may affect large software firms.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Large, profitable technology companies may benefit from cloud and AI demand, but price matters.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Single-stock concentration can fall sharply even when the company is strong.

stockIdeas.name: NVIDIA
stockIdeas.pressNotes: AI chip demand and data center growth are major public catalysts.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: AI infrastructure, export controls, semiconductor policy, and defense technology discussions can affect the stock.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: High-growth AI infrastructure leader with strong momentum, but valuation and volatility risk are elevated.
stockIdeas.riskNote: This can move sharply in both directions and should be sized carefully.

congressTrades.entryPriceSource: Estimated market close near report date
congressTrades.watchReason: Large technology exposure by a high-profile member household. Watch for timing around policy, chip demand, and market momentum.

congressTrades.entryPriceSource: Estimated market close near report date
congressTrades.watchReason: Large-cap AI and cloud exposure. Compare against broader tech watchlist before treating this as a standalone signal.

congressTrades.entryPriceSource: Estimated market close near report date
congressTrades.watchReason: Consumer technology exposure by a member often discussed in congressional trading datasets.
